Listen to this Update in your podcast player ( https://stratechery.passport.online/member/podcast?url=https%3A%2F%2Frss.stratechery.passport.online%2Ffeed%2Fpodcast%2F6EynvegSpNaDpnt4DJsHzD )

Hi folks,

Today’s Stratechery Interview was meant to accompany some site updates to Stratechery; unfortunately said updates encountered technical difficulties, and needed to be rolled back. Therefore I am holding back the Interview for now.

Monday is a federal holiday, and a scheduled Stratechery day off, but my hope is to post said Interview and associated updates instead. However, I can’t yet guarantee that.

In the meantime, do check-out this week’s Sharp Tech ( https://sharptech.fm/member/episode/a-is-uneven-arrival-tik-toks-potential-departure-xiaohongshu-and-the-delights-of-cultural-exchange ) , where Andrew and I expound on AI’s Uneven Arrival ( https://stratechery.com/2025/ais-uneven-arrival/?access_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6InN0cmF0ZWNoZXJ5LnBhc3Nwb3J0Lm9ubGluZSIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..lK3SUU7l7zXLswFefbfYB5BPgyDIRFZfEvxNl29W_-GIBjBAX9voQxCshUwWXQdIcnvgOjwEBgg7le2rui9TbXMdQvdX-8eTRMlD1j2C_covOg9Q9sEbT1sTiH0w9cDMBi8-OUImQywFBMyTaWirJfScmPdEchQFt8VLfG4uf2qnPV3_3k_GgpyJuH_8NvECdkGtwvnFoB0gKuoaKUnmUsatU_ujWXueXD4-MhfB_m4kYwI6MBebHmeSNAbOS0URknZO07ig-ITSqKYoMARghZbnxdRd4VFB2nYpGP2ZhY5hHNB40Im2cQzjYrl2lOe3iXFiFRcfNwy9u71XKQfoNw ) , as well as the TikTok ban and Xiaohongshu. I think it’s a good one.

See you next week, and thanks for your understanding.

Ben
